codeChallenge.title: Number Sign Checker
codeChallenge.prompt:
Write a C# program that reads one integer from standard input and prints exactly one of the following words:
- "Positive" if the number is greater than zero
- "Negative" if the number is less than zero
- "Zero" if the number equals zero

Do not print anything else — no extra spaces or newlines beyond what Console.WriteLine adds.
